## Scope

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and did not include unrelated rewrites.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, tokens, cookies, raw `auth.json`, `credentials`, `sessions`, credential store exports, or private account data.
- [ ] I redacted sensitive values from commands, logs, screenshots, and test output included in this PR.
- [ ] I considered Windows-specific behavior such as paths, permissions, WebView2, installer behavior, tray/menu behavior, and startup/shortcut handling.
- [ ] I considered Tauri-specific behavior such as capabilities, commands, updater settings, signing, and bundled resources.
- [ ] I updated tests or added manual verification notes for the changed behavior.
- [ ] I updated user-facing docs or release notes when the change affects users.
